title: qXP-Boosts
description: Create fully configurable and customizable xpboosts/multipliers- qxpboosts
body: --- ### Give your players fully configurable and customizable xp boosts! --- **Requirements**: - Paper/Forks 1.21.5+ (Spigot not supported) - Java 21+ --- How does it work? Whenever a player gains any xp, they receive a bonus amount depending on their active xp boosts. Boost Features: - ``multiplier``: XP gained is multiplied by this value - ``active`` Whether the boost is enabled/disabled - ``chance``: The percent chance of the boost triggering (per XP pickup per player) - ``chat``: Whether the player should receive a chat message everytime they gain bonus XP - ``action-bar``: Whether the player should receive an action bar title message everytime they gain bonus XP - ``sound``: Whether the player should receive a sound alert everytime they gain bonus XP - ``xp-sources``: Which xp sources the boost will trigger off of. List can be found [here](https://jd.papermc.io/paper/1.20/org/bukkit/entity/ExperienceOrb.SpawnReason.html) - ``mob-sources``: If the XP orb came from a dead mob, which mob's spawn reasoning will the boost trigger off of. List can be found [here](https://jd.papermc.io/paper/1.20/org/bukkit/event/entity/CreatureSpawnEvent.SpawnReason.html) Have any more ideas to configure? Join the quartzdev.gg [discord](https://www.quartzdev.gg/discord) and let us know! Permissions: - ``qxpboosts.player``: Required to receive a boost even if they have a specific boost permission (requirement is optional, and can be configured in the ``config.yml`` - ``qxpboosts.boost.``: Will receive a specific boost. If a player has no specific boost permission found, they will be given the default boost. - ``qxpboosts.admin``: Access to every command - ``qxpboosts.command.``: Access to a specific command --- This plugin uses bStats. You can opt-out in the bStats config
